title: thelypteris nipponica var. borealis
intro: Thelypteris nipponica var. borealis, also known as Japanese shield fern, is a type of fern native to Japan and other parts of East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Japanese shield fern is often used in tea, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
